name: Classic Sixth Edition

draft.notes: Basic lands do NOT appear in booster packs. US ordering common-rare-uncommon; Belgian uncommon-rare-common.

sourceNotes: Also known as Classic Sixth Edition. English printings from both USA and Belgium; both are 11C+3U+1R 15-card packs (36/box). No basic lands in boosters. Page does not mention foils in boosters, so foilOdds left null (note: 6ED released ~April 1999, around when foils were introduced in Urza's Legacy, but the page describes no foil slot). Four basic-land art variations. Sold with 60-card tournament packs rather than starter decks.
